blocks.text: Custom Adhesive Labels & Stickers That Stick With Quality
Strong adhesion on any surface.Engineered for performance and reliability.
From offset-printed product labels to digital short runs, Jinhao Xinyuan delivers precision, color consistency, and material versatility for global brands.

From product branding to safety instructions, our adhesive labels and stickers deliver durability, precision, and vibrant printing. Designed to withstand handling, transport, and storage, they adhere securely to a wide variety of surfaces. Whether you need roll labels, sheet stickers, or specialty die-cut designs, we offer tailored solutions that make your products stand out while staying compliant with industry standards.
• Offset, flexo, and digital printing systems
Offset, flexo, and digital printing systems
• Spot UV, varnish, and metallic finishes
Spot UV, varnish, and metallic finishes
Custom Stickers & Adhesive Labels That Last

We provide high-quality adhesive labels and stickers designed to combine strong adhesion with excellent print clarity. From product labeling and barcodes to branding and promotional stickers, our solutions ensure durability, easy application, and a professional finish.

Our range includes pressure-sensitive labels, tamper-evident seals, and specialty adhesives tailored for different surfaces and environments. Whether you need short-run customization or large-scale production, we deliver reliable labels that enhance product visibility and maintain performance throughout their lifecycle.
